What's going on everyone? We have reached everyone's favorite section. Make sure you don't f this up So here are the following things that you want to make sure that you don't f up First make sure that you put their email in when you're doing the order instead of your own that way they get the tracking They understand that they made the purchase and they know what's actually coming to them It also double messes things up If you were to put your own in because then they would also be getting emails about how to run their gym And you don't want that either so please please please make sure that you put their email in and not yours Don't say oh, I'm gonna collect everything. That's stupid and that's not how this works and you will just Mess a lot of things up. Please don't do that Second and it messes things up for you believe me. Don't do it. Okay to Make sure that you don't auto save a credit card in terms of same person for another person's order So for example you're putting in 10 orders Make sure that the first person's card does not get saved and then automatically get re-entered for every person's order after that Now we've already put code in so that no person's card can be billed Within a time period. I think it's 10 or 30 minutes twice So we prevented that by putting code in because it happened a couple times So but this is just a reminder to you and you probably don't want to save like you shouldn't save people's credit card Anyways, you shouldn't have it auto-filled. So Don't do that Third don't run ads to your affiliate link for a couple reasons one is you're gonna waste money because the page is not Optimized for cold traffic acquisition. So you will probably just throw money away to you'll also piss off everyone else who is Saying that you can't publicly have access to this And then they get an ad for the same price that they Just were told that they couldn't get it for so that is what you should not do Do not do that. It's also in the agreement. So just as a reminder That being said, it's totally fine 100% encouraged to post your link organically So if you want to put it in the link in your bio for your Instagram, or you want to put it on your on your emails Or you want to put it on your in your membership sites All that stuff is 100% fine and encouraged because all of those are things that are associated with you having a business And it is associated with you being a licensed distributor. It's just not being pushed out to the public Which is cold traffic that is not associated to you. Okay, so Don't run as the affiliate link. You can put it else. You can put it anywhere else you want organically Sales tax make sure that you're mentioning it in the sale. So like it's gonna be this plus tax It's on the form already, but make sure you mention it It does change depending on where you're at if you're an international customer your taxes tend to be higher than the United States is and that is something that I cannot control Also note the prices are in USD So when you are processing something that is not USD it will be it will do the conversion ratio that is Current at that time. So if for example, you're in Canada You know the Canadian dollar at this point is like 70% of the American dollar and so prices are higher right by extension It's the same actual price But the relative price because of the currency would appear higher even though the relative value is the same Order forms what to do with them make sure that you save them And put them somewhere in a filing cabinet do them just organize them Alphabetically for yourself just like you would for an EFT membership because it works the exact same way keep them under lock and key in standard Information security protocols. Okay, check with your lawyer and your accountant for your state for the right protocols All right, but most times under lock and key is the way to do it All right And the reason for that is because if we ever have an issue we may ask you for it to make sure that you're not putting in fake orders Which of course you would never do because that would make some sense But that you just need to have a record of the sale. All right Next shipping and handling options. You'll notice that there are two on there that are almost the same price The the point that we do that is so that they see the added value of just paying like an extra dollar and getting faster shipping So most people take that offer that is what I would recommend you do so that they can get the product faster To them that is how that works that way they can start the program and with the most excited they get the product Okay, that is it so that concludes our our section today on make sure you Do this and don't f this up
